policy.purpose: Force repository and product surface changes to be explicit. New modules, routes, workflows, jobs, storefront entrypoints, site profiles, or AI scripts fail until this baseline is intentionally updated.

backendModules.name: ai-core
backendModules.rationale: Provider-agnostic AI platform core and admin visibility surface; additions must declare owner and verification before CI can pass.

storefrontEntrypoints.rationale: Customer account sign-in and registration page for email/password and optional Google authentication.
Authenticated customer account dashboard with reusable order access links and guest checkout fallback.
Lightweight customer password reset page for optional email/password accounts while guest order recovery remains available.
Storefront BFF callback route that completes customer Google authentication and stores the auth token in an HttpOnly cookie.
Storefront BFF route that starts optional customer Google authentication without exposing provider details to client code.
Storefront BFF route for customer email/password sign-in using an HttpOnly auth cookie.
Storefront BFF route that clears the customer auth cookie for account sign-out.
Storefront BFF route that exposes the current customer account to server-backed UI flows without exposing stored tokens.
Storefront BFF route that confirms customer password reset through the backend auth provider without exposing provider details to client code.
Storefront BFF route that requests a customer password reset with account rate limiting, optional Turnstile, and a controlled reset URL.
Storefront BFF route for customer account creation and automatic sign-in through an HttpOnly auth cookie.

obligations: derive proof obligations from inventory, production readiness, config, system map, admin policy, evidence policy, and compare-ref state
fail CI on unsatisfied obligation issues
avoid adding duplicate go-live-only warnings for production env files
aiScripts.rationale: Executable obligation gate turns review prompts into repository-derived proof requirements for future surface expansion.
Production readiness gate tracks API contract, body validation debt, schema migration baselines, and production config coverage.
Current repository surface registered during governance hardening; additions must declare owner and verification before CI can pass.
